parsed.fixed_xml: <file name="line_23.json"><ITEM>2. Bey Herrn Euler dem Buchbinder am Rheinsprung ist zu erfragen, wo folgende Bücher in raisonablem Preiße zu haben seyen: <BIBL><TITLE>Janii & Tremellii Biblia cum Annotationibus</TITLE></BIBL>; <BIBL><TITLE>Acta Eruditorum Lipsiensia</TITLE> de An. <YEAR>1738</YEAR> & <YEAR>1739</YEAR>.</BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Mohemii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Institutiones Histor. Christ.</TITLE> maiores <VOLUME>1. Seculi</VOLUME>, samtl. in <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT>. <BIBL><TITLE>Titus Livius</TITLE> ex Editione <AUTHOR>Joannis Clerici</AUTHOR></BIBL>; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Ovidii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Tristia & Epistolae ex Ponto</TITLE> mit <AUTHOR>Sinceri</AUTHOR> Anmerckungen</BIBL>; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Herodianus</AUTHOR> Graece & Latine cum notis <AUTHOR>Bocceri</AUTHOR></BIBL>; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Elianus</AUTHOR> Graece & Latine cum notis <AUTHOR>Schefferi</AUTHOR></BIBL>; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Schrevelii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Lexicon Graeco Latinum & Lat. parsed.explanation: 1. Fixed corrupted Unicode characters (e.g., '\u221a\u00bacher' to 'Bücher', '\u221a\u00fc' to 'Preiße', '\u221a\u2264' to 'to/vo'). 2. Closed unclosed <BIBL> tags (nested <BIBL> tags inside another <BIBL> were restructured). 3. Corrected the format descriptors ('4t\u221a\u2264' to '4to', '8v\u221a\u2264' to '8vo'). 4. Fixed the text 'iraisonablem' to 'raisonablem'. 5. Ensured proper nesting and closing of all XML tags. 6. Removed redundant <BIBL> tags that were incorrectly nested and merged content where necessary.
